description: MotionHub is a TV and media production platform for managing projects, media storage, AI cataloguing, transcription, scripts, calendars, budgets, and related production workflows. It is used by production teams to organize content and production operations in one system.
summary: MotionHub exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://api.motionhub.ai/mcp for AI assistants; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found.
